overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3: Blood and Wine, showing the character Geralt walking through the Mediterranean-inspired city of Beauclair. The character moves from a manicured garden estate through cobblestone streets, narrow alleys, and a bustling market district with colorful Renaissance architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: manicured garden estate with stone pathways

events.description: character passes through wrought iron gate from enclosed garden to outer path
descends wide stone staircase in garden area

agents.ego_description: walking through manicured garden estate, passing through decorative iron gates and descending stone stairs

notable_agents.action: man sitting on stone bench beside the garden path

entered.detail: tall black iron gate with decorative spikes and scrollwork
large white stone building with red roof and multiple arched windows
ornate carved stone column with decorative capital
lush green bushes, flowering plants, and manicured hedges
wide stone staircase with moss-covered edges leading downward

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a manicured garden estate with the character approaching a wrought iron gate. The camera moves through the gate and descends a wide stone staircase, passing a man sitting on a stone bench. Lush vegetation lines the path while a large white mansion with a red roof stands prominently in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone city street with colorful Mediterranean townhouses

events.description: exits garden estate through iron fence gate into open urban street
turns right onto main cobblestone street approaching plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking along sunlit cobblestone streets between colorful Renaissance-style buildings with red and blue facades

notable_agents.action: woman in green dress walking along the building wall
man leaning against stone wall observing the street

entered.detail: three-story building with blue facade and white window shutters
irregular stone paving with grass growing between cracks
black wrought iron fence separating garden from street

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the garden into a sunlit cobblestone street lined with colorful Mediterranean townhouses. The camera turns right and proceeds along the street, passing pedestrians including a woman in a green dress and a man leaning against a wall. The iron fence of the garden remains visible on the left as the character approaches a plaza area.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alleyway with red plaster walls and ascending stone stairs

events.description: enters narrow alley with vibrant red walls from open plaza area
begins ascending long flight of stone stairs between buildings

agents.ego_description: walking up steep cobblestone alley and climbing wide stone stairs between buildings covered in green ivy

notable_agents.action: man in purple tunic and hat walking down the stairs toward camera

entered.detail: vibrant red plaster building facades with climbing green ivy
long flight of wide stone steps with mossy edges and stone railings
stone archway covered in dense green vines marking alley entrance

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow alleyway with vibrant red walls covered in green ivy. The space becomes increasingly enclosed as the character approaches and begins ascending a long flight of stone stairs. A man in a purple tunic walks down the stairs in the opposite direction. The alley opens up to a vine-covered stone archway at the top of the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: market street with wooden merchant stalls and stacked barrels

events.description: passes through vine-covered brick archway into bustling market district
navigates between wooden market stalls and merchant carts displaying goods

agents.ego_description: walking through busy market area, weaving between stalls and passing merchants and browsing townspeople

notable_agents.action: merchant in blue dress standing behind wooden stall with goods
man in green tunic browsing items at market cart

entered.detail: wooden carts with canvas awnings displaying various merchant goods
stacked wooden barrels and crates along the building wall
tall red building with ornate windows and hanging decorative banners

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the archway into a bustling market street lined with wooden merchant stalls and stacked barrels. The camera weaves between the stalls where merchants and townspeople browse goods. A tall red mansion with decorative banners stands at the end of the street, while the cobblestone path continues through the busy marketplace.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the quiet seclusion of a manicured estate into the vibrant, crowded energy of a city marketplace. It begins by passing through a wrought iron gate and descending a wide stone staircase past a seated man, with a large white mansion and lush greenery framing the descent. As the character emerges from the garden, the scene opens into a sunlit cobblestone street lined with colorful Mediterranean townhouses and strolling pedestrians. The path then shifts into a narrow, enclosed alleyway with ivy-covered red walls, leading the camera up a long flight of stone stairs and through a vine-draped archway. Finally, the environment expands into a bustling market street filled with wooden merchant stalls and barrels, weaving through a crowd of townspeople toward a tall red mansion adorned with decorative banners.
